input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.7
            TITLE: cylinder location - the gas cylinder/tank and the pressure regulator must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.7: Cylinder Location - The gas cylinder/tank and the pressure regulator must be:
T.6.1.7 Cylinder Location - The gas cylinder/tank and the pressure regulator must be:  
a. Securely mounted inside the Chassis  
b. Located outside of the Cockpit 
c. In a position below the height of the Shoulder Belt Mount T.2.6 
d. Aligned so the axis of the gas cylinder/tank does not point at the driver

final_answer: rule T.6.1.7: Cylinder Location - The gas cylinder/tank and the pressure regulator must be: T.6.1.7 Cylinder Location - The gas cylinder/tank and the pressure regulator must be: a. Securely mounted inside the Chassis b. Located outside of the Cockpit c. In a position below the height of the Shoulder Belt Mount T.2.6 d. Aligned so the axis of the gas cylinder/tank does not point at the driver
